items.title: Solana falls below $76 range low: Will SOL fall below $50 in 2026?
items.whyYouShouldCare: Solana's drop below the $76 range indicates potential bearish sentiment, raising concerns about its ability to maintain value above $50 in the coming years.

items.title: Hyperliquid’s HYPE overtakes Solana in price as SOL falls to lowest levels since 2023
items.whyYouShouldCare: The rise of Hyperliquid's HYPE above SOL highlights competitive pressures in the market, potentially impacting Solana's liquidity and user engagement.

items.title: Solayer rolls out Solana-native onchain perps trading platform Margin Trade mainnet
items.whyYouShouldCare: The launch of Solayer's onchain perps trading platform enhances Solana's ecosystem, potentially increasing trading volume and attracting more users to the network.
